scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic photograph of an American diner interior matching image1 layout. Male clerk (image2) in white button-up shirt and black pants counts register bills with quick focused fingers, talking to brunette young woman (image3) in faded black t-shirt, black pants, and black bib apron with red Ruby's Diner script who stands on the left side nearby facing him. Few customers in red booths. Warm morning light.
